compiled_state.title: [bridge-outbound]: COMPACT event on tickets branch -> bridge creates duplicate Jira issue and loses prior key mapping
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
### 2. Incident Overview

* **Scenario Type:** Code Bug
* **Component:** bridge-outbound.py

#### Expected Behavior

When a ticket is compacted (COMPACT commit replaces individual event files + SYNC file with a SNAPSHOT file), the outbound bridge should:
- Recognize the SNAPSHOT as a state snapshot, not a new CREATE event
- Use the existing Jira key from the SNAPSHOT (if present) for any status updates
- NOT create a duplicate Jira issue

#### Actual Behavior

After COMPACT commit on the tickets branch:
- bridge-outbound.py does `git diff HEAD~1 HEAD --name-only` on .tickets-tracker/
- The SNAPSHOT file appears as a new file in the diff (COMPACT replaced individual events)
- The SYNC event file was removed by COMPACT, so has_existing_sync() returns False
- Bridge interprets SNAPSHOT as a CREATE event, calls acli to create a new Jira issue
- A duplicate Jira issue is created with just [ticket-id] as summary (not the full title)
- The prior Jira mapping (e.g., 5dc3-0d5e → DIG-1573) is lost; new SYNC written pointing to the duplicate (DIG-1574)

#### Evidence

Observed during 44a0-3a13 bridge verification (2026-04-27):
- Created test ticket 5dc3-0d5e → bridge outbound CREATE → DIG-1573 (correct title + description)
- Closed 5dc3-0d5e → triggered COMPACT
- Ran bridge on COMPACT commit → output: '5dc3-0d5e -> DIG-1574'
- DIG-1574 had summary '[5dc3-0d5e]' (not the title), status 'Done'
- DIG-1573 still exists in Jira but is now orphaned from the ticket

comments.body: Investigated (debug-everything 2026-04-28): Bridge-outbound COMPACT duplication — when a ticket is compacted, the bridge re-creates a Jira issue. This requires changes to bridge-outbound.py to detect SNAPSHOT files and skip CREATE for already-synced tickets. This is a code-level fix in the Jira bridge. Leaving open for a dedicated bridge sprint.
comments.author: Test

comments.body:
Investigation result (cluster INTERMEDIATE):

ROOT_CAUSE: git diff HEAD~1 HEAD --name-only (no --diff-filter) returns both added AND deleted files; COMPACT deletes SYNC.json (not excluded from event_files) so has_existing_sync() returns False; the deleted CREATE.json in the diff is re-processed as a CREATE event → acli creates duplicate issue with [ticket-id] placeholder title; additionally, resolve_jira_key() returns None post-COMPACT for all subsequent outbound events (STATUS/COMMENT/EDIT) since it also globs *-SYNC.json only.

confidence: high

proposed_fix (E = A+C):
  A: bridge-outbound.py:161 - change git diff to --diff-filter=A --name-only (added-only)
  C: ticket-compact.sh:162-166 - exclude *-SYNC.json from event_files so SYNC survives compaction

hypothesis_tests:
  - confirmed: bridge-outbound.py:161 uses --name-only with no --diff-filter (added+deleted both appear)
  - confirmed: ticket-compact.sh event_files includes all *.json not starting with dot (SYNC included, deleted)
  - confirmed: has_existing_sync() only globs *-SYNC.json (line 103-105); returns False after COMPACT
  - confirmed: no SNAPSHOT handler exists in process_outbound() dispatcher
  - confirmed: no tests exercise COMPACT->bridge interaction
comments.author: Test

comments.body:
Fix verified (2026-04-29):

Fix A: bridge-outbound.py - git diff now uses --diff-filter=A --name-only (added files only). Deleted event files (CREATE.json, SYNC.json) no longer appear in the diff output for COMPACT commits.

Fix C: ticket-compact.sh - *-SYNC.json excluded from event_files. SYNC file survives compaction; resolve_jira_key() returns correct Jira key for all post-compact outbound events (STATUS, COMMENT, EDIT).

Tests GREEN:
- test_bridge_outbound_compact.py::test_compact_commit_does_not_create_duplicate_issue ✅
- test_bridge_outbound_compact.py::test_compact_commit_with_existing_sync_on_disk_does_not_create_duplicate ✅  
- test_bridge_outbound_compact.py::test_resolve_jira_key_survives_compact_when_sync_preserved ✅
- test-ticket-compact.sh::test_compact_preserves_sync_file ✅
- All 59 bridge outbound tests still pass ✅
- test-ticket-compact.sh 18/18 pass ✅
comments.author: Test
